name: workable
description: Reads Workable recruiting, account, employee, time tracking, time off, review, subscription, requisition, and offer data; writes Workable candidate, employee, department, member, subscription, time tracking, time off, offer, and requisition mutations.

risk.read: external Workable SPI v3 reads across recruiting, account, employee, time tracking, time off, review, subscription, requisition, and offer endpoints
risk.write: creates, updates, approves, rejects, archives, deactivates, or deletes Workable recruiting/HR resources according to the selected action
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
